# Statistical Considerations in Randomized Controlled Trials

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Intention-to-treat and per-protocol analysis

_To be added._

## Protocol violations

_To be added._

## Multiple comparisons

_To be added._

## Interim analysis and alpha spending

_To be added._

## Subgroup analysis

_To be added._

## Multicenter trials

_To be added._

## Appendix: NEJM statistical guidelines

_To be added._
